title: peucedanum ostruthium var. angustifolium
intro: Peucedanum ostruthium var. angustifolium, also known as Mountain Carrot, is a variant of the Peucedanum ostruthium plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mountain Carrot include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and easing respiratory problems, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Mountain Carrot include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
